info.name: Furniture Factory - Inventory + User Management API
info.description:
Gabungan REST API untuk:
1. Sistem Inventory Pabrik Furniture (Material, PO, GR, Stock Opname, dll)
2. User Management dengan RBAC, CDN File Management, dan User Avatar

Fitur Inventory:
- Material Management (Kayu, Finishing, Kain, Hardware, Packaging)
- Multi Currency (USD, CNY, IDR)
- Supplier International & Lokal
- Purchase Order & Goods Receipt
- Stock Opname
- Damage Report & Material Disposal
- Document Management (Customs, PIB, SPPB)
- Upload Documents ke CDN
- Stock Movement Tracking

Fitur User Management:
- Authentication (Register, Login, Profile)
- Role-Based Access Control (Applications, Modules, Roles, Permissions)
- User Avatar Management
- CDN File Management (Upload, Download, Preview, Folder Management)

request.description: Dapatkan profil user yang sedang login (termasuk avatar).

formdata.description: Pilih foto avatar (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP - max 2 MB)

request.description: Upload/Update foto profil user. Hanya gambar (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP) dengan maksimal 2 MB.

}

request.description: System akan otomatis menghitung variance antara system_qty dan actual_qty
Complete opname akan otomatis membuat stock adjustment untuk selisih
Menampilkan detail opname beserta variance per item

body.raw:
{
    "material_id": {{wood_material_id}},
    "batch_number": "BATCH-JT-2026-001",
    "quantity": 0.5000,
    "volume_m3": 0.5000,
    "unit_cost": 850.0000,
    "condition_description": "Kayu berjamur di bagian permukaan, tidak bisa digunakan untuk produksi",
    "root_cause": "Kelembaban gudang di atas 80% selama 1 minggu"
}

request.description: Approve laporan dan proses pemusnahan material. Stock akan otomatis berkurang.
Generate nomor PIB (Pemberitahuan Impor Barang) otomatis
